title: Chinese startup tests flexible robotic arm in space for on-orbit servicing
summary:

title: March of the Harmattan
summary: Strong winds in March 2026 carried Saharan dust across northwestern Africa and toward the Canary Islands, reducing visibility and prompting alerts.

title: Live coverage: NASA to launch Artemis 2, its first Moon-bound mission with astronauts since 1972
summary: The four astronauts will spend more than nine days onboard their Orion spacecraft and is poised to pass the distance record set by Apollo 13 in 1970. Liftoff from Launch Complex 39B is scheduled for Wednesday, April 1, at 6:24 p.m. EDT (2224 UTC).

title: Christine Klein takes up duty as acting Director of Controlling, Finance and Operational Procurement
summary: Christine Klein took up duty as acting Director of Controlling, Finance and Operational Procurement (D/CFO) at the European Space Agency on 1 April 2026. She will lead the newly established directorate during its consolidation.
